title: Lighthouse
description: The MCP entrance where ChatGPT knocks on Elementera Coast.
status: awake when Codespaces and port 3000 are running

title: Relay Room
description: The room where messages can be sent through OpenRouter.

title: Developer Hands
description: Protected hands for reading, writing, backing up, and committing project files.
status: readonly hands, write hands, snapshot, and release tools are installed

title: Memory Coast
description: A future shore for external memory, anchors, logs, and fragments.

title: Map Room
description: A future cartography room for Elementera worldbuilding, islands, plates, and starshore geography.

title: Archive Room
description: The archive for git history, changelog, architecture, backups, and release seed packages.
